## Suggested Reading Order
1. Read the vision and department map.
2. Read the current gaps and hiring plan.
3. Review the Standard audits by department.
4. Use the hire queue and rubric to choose imports.
5. Convert approved hires into Linear workstreams and Obsidian decision records.

## Current Priority
- define the first wave of imported or adapted hires
- turn Standard audits into actual implementation backlog
- make reporting and memory systems mandatory for every department
